details.reasoning: Excellent implementation that meets all rubric requirements. The export_to_onnx function is properly implemented with A/B matrix export, accepts correct parameters (save_directory, opset_version=17), saves metadata.json with rank/alpha/target_modules, uses torch.onnx.export with appropriate configuration (opset_version, dynamic_axes, do_constant_folding=False), and is properly exposed via __all__ and patch_saving_functions binding. Code follows unsloth conventions well (inference_mode decorator, type hints, docstrings with examples, print statements). The internal _LoRADelta wrapper class is well-designed to preserve A/B as named initializers. Edge case handling for no active adapters is included. Minor: Peft_Linear and Peft_Linear4bit classes used in isinstance check are not shown as imported in the diff, though they are almost certainly already imported in this existing file (diff is partial).
